description: Nicobar is an Indian lifestyle brand offering contemporary clothing, home decor, and accessories with a focus on modern, minimalist design inspired by Indian aesthetics.
target_customers: Urban, design-conscious individuals seeking modern Indian-inspired lifestyle products
distribution_channels: Retail stores in major Indian cities
company_culture: Design-driven, sustainable practices, emphasis on craftsmanship and ethical sourcing
notable_facts: Founded by the team behind Good Earth
Known for clean lines and natural fabrics
